feat.name: Dirty Trick
feat.text: You hook a foe's bootlaces together, pull their hat over their eyes, loosen their belt, or otherwise confound their mobility through an underhanded tactic. Attempt a Thievery check against the target's Reflex DC.

traits.name: Attack
traits.text: An ability with this trait involves an attack. For each attack you make beyond the first on your turn, you take a multiple attack penalty.

traits.name: General
traits.text: A type of feat that any character can select, regardless of ancestry and class, as long as they meet the prerequisites. You can select a feat with this trait when your class grants a general feat.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

traits.name: Skill
traits.text: A general feat with the skill trait improves your skills and their actions or gives you new actions for a skill. A feat with this trait can be selected when a class grants a skill feat or general feat. Archetype feats with the skill trait can be selected in place of a skill feat if you have that archetype’s dedication feat.

feat.requirement: You have a hand free and are within melee reach of an opponent.
feat.critical_success: The target is clumsy 1 until they use an Interact action to end the impediment
feat.success: As critical success, but the condition ends automatically after 1 round.
feat.critical_failure: You fall prone as your attempt backfires.
